recommendations.title: Black Lotus
recommendations.overview: An ex-special forces operative wages a one man war through the streets of Amsterdam to rescue his friend's daughter from the local crime syndicate.

recommendations.title: Transfusion
recommendations.overview: Ryan Logan, a former Special Forces operative, is battling to cope with life after the loss of his wife.  He is thrusted into the criminal underworld to keep his only son from being taken from him.

recommendations.title: Jolt
recommendations.overview: A bouncer with an anger management problem goes on a furious and resentful rampage after the murder of a friend.

recommendations.title: Kate
recommendations.overview: A ruthless criminal operative has less than 24 hours to exact revenge on her enemies and in the process forms an unexpected bond with the daughter of one of her past victims.

recommendations.title: Tin Soldier
recommendations.overview: An ex-special forces operative seeks revenge against a cult leader who has corrupted his former comrades, the Shinjas. This leader, known as The Bokushi, promises veterans a purpose and protection, but is revealed to be a destructive influence. The e

recommendations.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
recommendations.overview: The Bride unwaveringly continues on her roaring rampage of revenge against the band of assassins who had tried to kill her and her unborn child. She visits each of her former associates one-by-one, checking off the victims on her Death List Five unti

recommendations.title: Boss Level
recommendations.overview: A former special forces agent is trapped in a time loop and relives his death over and over again. To escape the terrible situation, he must track down those responsible and stop them.

recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: Deadpool
recommendations.overview: The origin story of former Special Forces operative turned mercenary Wade Wilson, who, after being subjected to a rogue experiment that leaves him with accelerated healing powers, adopts the alter ego Deadpool. Armed with his new abilities and a dark

recommendations.title: MR-9: Do or Die
recommendations.overview: Elite Bangladeshi CIA agent Masud Rana – codename MR-9 – teams up with an American CIA operative to bring down an international criminal organization headed by a ruthless businessman.
